LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ERNEST DEL SIMONE AND E MCGETTIGAN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FURTHER AMENDED COMPLAINT TO SET FORTH A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PROMISSORY FRAUD IS GRANTED. AN AMENDED COMPLAINT MAY BE FILED WHICH DOES NOT INCLUDE CONTRACT CAUSES OF ACTION, IS LIMITED TO A FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION AND WHICH MUST, IF CAN BE DONE IN GOOD FAITH, STATE A FRAUD CLAIM THAT IS INDEPENDENT OF THE EXISTENCE OF THESE CONTRACTS. PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER IN PREPARING A FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT, ENCOMPASSING THE THREE MOTIONS HEARD TODAY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

Ntc Of And Mtn For Leave To File A Further Amended Complaint To Set Forth A Cause Of Action For Promissory Fraud
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John J. Conneely, 650-341-6900, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties
Howard R. Melamed, 925-932-0417, appearing via Court Call for defendant and responding party

Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS ERNEST DEL SIMONE and E MCGETTIGAN'S Motion For Leave To File A Further Amended Complaint To Set Forth A Cause Of Action For Promissory Fraud is granted. An amended complaint may be filed which does not include contract causes of action, is limited to a fraud cause of action and which must, if can be done in good faith, state a fraud claim that is independent of the existence of these contracts. Parties are to meet and confer in preparing a form of order for the Court, encompassing the three motions heard today. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
